title: WagerWrld — betting with the boys app (Jan 2024)
html:
TL;DR

  • WagerWrld is the Jan 2024 product memo for a peer-vs-peer sports-betting app, the documented conceptual ancestor of Vrtl Bet in the stealth-apps cluster.
  • Genesis: Yahir watching Emilio and his boys compete on Underdog parlays and noticing "there isn't a mainstream platform or service for betting on sports within the boys."
  • Core mechanic: 1v1 parlay duels (both shoot 4-leg 10x parlays, $5 → $50, side-wagers on top with adjusted spread payout) plus 1v1 head-to-head wagers on UFC, tennis, boxing, esports, golf — "centralize the inconvenience of 1-to-1 betting" off Venmo.
  • Crypto-native rail considered (Yahir flags it as a way to "open up the platform to a whole other demographic" and dodge state-by-state USD restrictions) — first documented crypto-as-regulatory-arbitrage reasoning in his project docs.
  • Competitor scan he ran: BuddyBets, WagerLab, PeerBet, BetSquad, BroThrow, Kutt, Betfair exchange — confirms the space was crowded and Yahir consciously parked the idea.

Other shape notes

  • Group leaderboards + copy-betting (proto-social-trading) baked in from day one — same primitive Yahir later builds into Brotein and Outpace social tracking.
  • Unscalable cold-start tactic: "go out to local events and offer the app for the specific event, and create odds within it" — early example of the do things that don't scale rule he keeps invoking.
  • AI betting suggestions ("like what Watson has on ESPN fantasy") and "compete against your favorite celebrity" feature — speculative add-ons, never specced further.
  • KYC concern flagged explicitly — Yahir already understood the regulatory wall was the real moat.
  • Open question he leaves: "How would you deter people from making a double account and betting against themselves?" — collusion-resistance, never solved here.

Privacy

  • No PII beyond Yahir + Emilio (already-vault people). No financial figures beyond hypothetical $5/$10 stakes.

Relations

  • vrtl bet — direct successor in the gambling-app lineage (2025-10)
  • — parent cluster
  • swipr — sibling peer-wager mechanic
  • brotein / outpace — share the social-leaderboard primitive
  • emilio — origin observation (brother's friend group)
  • do things that dont scale — first invocation in vault projects
